title: Backup protection
description: Verify database encryption and how this device protects its backup key.

states.browser: Protection status is verified only by the Electron desktop app.
states.unsupported: Update the desktop app to verify backup protection.
states.error: Backup protection could not be verified. Restart the desktop app and try again.

protected.summary: SQLCipher encrypts the database and backup files, while the operating system protects the key.

development.summary: SQLCipher is active, but this development session receives its key from an environment variable instead of the OS keychain.

degraded.summary: SQLCipher is active, but the operating-system key provider could not be attested.

securityNote: This verification returns protection metadata only. It never reads or exposes the backup key.

schedule.title: Scheduled encrypted snapshots
schedule.description: Keep automatic restore points in a device-managed or custom folder. Snapshots stay SQLCipher encrypted.
schedule.unsupported: Update the desktop app to configure scheduled snapshots.
schedule.lastRunFailed: The latest scheduled snapshot failed. Check the destination and try again.

errors.load: Unable to load the snapshot schedule.
errors.save: Unable to save the snapshot schedule.
errors.destination: Unable to update the snapshot folder.
errors.snapshot: Unable to create the encrypted snapshot.
